meta.title: SEEK NZ 绿名单岗位追踪
meta.description: 每日自动扫描 SEEK NZ 邮件中的绿名单 Tier1 ICT 岗位

tier1_jobs.title: AI & Data Scientist
reasons: 绿名单Tier2: Data Scientist (Work to Residence)
tier1_jobs.immigration_path: 绿名单Tier2 Work to Residence — 需工作2年转居留
tier1_jobs.suggested_skills: 1)Python/R + ML项目作品集；2)Kaggle/GitHub展示；3)统计学基础补强
